case_title: YOKOMICHI, KIYOSHI VS LAKHUBHAI, MAHENDIRA: MANAGER et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $150.00 FILED BY YOKOMICHI, KIYOSHI AS TO DEFENDANT LAKHUBHAI, MAHENDIRA: MANAGER KEAN HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

CORRESPONDENCE REC'D FROM PLFT FILED. COPIES SENT TO JUDGE ORR & JUDGE DESMOND.
